name: fx-arena
description: Framework comparison: React / Svelte 5 / Imba / Ripple simple-bench + docs Pages report

scripts.report:local: bun run build:simple && bun run bench && bun run metrics:bundle && bun run report:render
scripts.clean: rm -rf simple-bench/*/dist metrics/raw metrics/summary.json metrics/bundle-size.json docs/index.html docs/zh.html docs/summary.json docs/bundle-size.json site
